gamerule.ladderspeed.climb_speed.descrip: Percentage multiplier for vertical climb speed on ladders. (100 = 1.0x)
gamerule.ladderspeed.sprint_multiplier.d: Percentage multiplier for ladder climb speed while sprinting. (150 = 1.5x)
gamerule.ladderspeed.descend_speed.descr: Percentage multiplier for sliding down ladders. (100 = 1.0x)
gamerule.ladderspeed.snap_descend.descri: When enabled, looking down while on a ladder will significantly speed up descent.
